user.title: Set up Flamerite Glazer
user.description: Select your Flamerite Glazer fire from the list of discovered devices.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Flamerite Glazer discovered
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name} ({address})?

abort.no_devices_found: No Flamerite devices were found. Make sure your fire is powered on and Bluetooth is enabled.
abort.not_supported: This device is not supported by the Flamerite Glazer integration.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device. Make sure it is powered on and in range.
